title: aconitum × bartokianum nothosubsp. bartokianum
intro: Aconitum × bartokianum nothosubsp. bartokianum, also known as Bartok's monk's hood, is a hybrid subspecies of the Aconitum genus, which includes a group of flowering plants commonly known as monk's hood or wolf's bane. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to numb the skin and reduce inflammation, making it useful in treating pain and arthritis. The health benefits of Aconitum × bartokianum nothosubsp. bartokianum include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and reduce stress, although its use should be approached with caution due to its toxicity. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made from its dried roots and rhizomes, and are often used in traditional medicine to create teas, tinctures, and other remedies.
